text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I've kept running from the Mejiro name. But not
because I hate my family or anything.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I ran because I'm so proud of them. I thought I
wasn't worthy. That I wasn't good enough.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (But even when I turned my back on them...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(They still supported me. They told me to run
even harder if I felt guilty for not being enough.
They told me I could find a different way to be
strong.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Today, I'm gonna take the answer I found...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And I'm gonna face them head-on again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer! Let's go, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Time to go wild and bring the ultimate party by
being the ultimate me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, McQueen. Let's use today to really show
everyone how strong Mejiro Umamusume are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We may be facing a lot of competitors today, but
there's no way we're losing to any of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But of course. We have a story that only we can
tell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The story of our noble path and those we must
overcome in order to walk it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Don't you think that's, like, kinda boring?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If it's that noble, only the hero or heroine from
the very beginning of the tale can win, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I have my own story to share too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's a little different from the others... but it's a
Mejiro story all the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer stands in the middle of the
paddock and looks out at the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The runaway slay, Mejiro Palmer, is in da
house! ☆ Thanks for coming, everyone! By the
way, did you all know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I used to be mad cringe. I couldn't take it, so I ran
away from the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I'd stayed, I wouldn't have been able to keep
going. But after I ran away...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I met my bestie and my trainer. They helped me
turn things around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I started from scratch, found my own way of
running, and owned it. And it's taken me all the
way to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I never had any pride. I was a coward who turned
my back on everything and ran.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But now... I'm proud of myself! I ran from the
Mejiros I love so much, mulled everything over
and over, and then, finally...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I found a strength that's equal to McQueen and
Ryan's very own, although it's not the type of
strength you typically expect from a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not just friendship that Mejiro Palmer's found.
She's found strength from that friendship as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's given her the strength to persevere even when
things are tough. It's a strength she's gained from
enjoying herself while she and Helios pushed each
other to greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I may have run away, but that's not all! I've been
searching the entire time I was away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I searched for a strength I never would've found if
I'd stayed! And for the parts of myself that would
have always been hidden from my sight by the
blinding light of the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: My trainer and bestie taught me that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I'm here today! I've come to face
the Mejiro family head on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
In the past, no one had a glance to spare for me.
It wasn't worth anyone's time to look at me. But
not anymore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Take a good look, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The black sheep of the Mejiro family who ran off
with her tail between her legs has found the
strength to stand before you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I may be the black sheep, but I'm still a Mejiro!
I'm the Mejiro who walked a path no one else
could!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with having a different
story! There's nothing wrong with starting your
story as a complete nobody!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I have a story where weakness turns into strength!
And today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: As a Mejiro! Here and now! I'm gonna slaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that she may not be the kind of Mejiro
that people tend to look up to. That said...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is also unmistakably a drop of sunlight sprung
forth from the distinguished Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, McQueen... Palmer is certainly different
today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. She's become a Mejiro beyond all of our
imaginations...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You killed it, queen! ☆ And look at you!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You're totes fine, even on your own now. You've
got nothing to worry about with those aura points
of yours! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you think so? But honestly, you're the
reason I've gotten to the point where I could say
all that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So thanks, bestie. Thank you for everything
before and everything to come. ♪ Now, let's
finish this and win together!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bet! ♪ Whatever happens, the two of us are on
the same vibe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's distance will certainly be difficult for
Daitaku Helios. Still, their dream is unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer stands at the gate as the ultimate
partyer, supported by the bonds of friendship
and her own self confidence.
